name: team stat with per_team_pass_play
description: Test case for team stat with per_team_pass_play
expected_query: with "t6867094ca01e672f091e68479097f2b6" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" = 'PASS' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."pos_team" as "team_code", SUM(pass_yds) AS m_5aa080ea24f2 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.pos_team) select "player"."pid", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01.m_5aa080ea24f2) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t6867094ca01e672f091e68479097f2b6.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays_0, "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2023 left join "t6867094ca01e672f091e68479097f2b6" on "t6867094ca01e672f091e68479097f2b6"."off" = "player_year_teams"."team" left join "rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01" on "rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01"."team_code" = "player_year_teams"."team" group by "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
